steps.name: cia-impact-levels
steps.summary: FIPS 199 CIA impact levels added to ProductManifest with schema validation, tier elevation logic, and AI prompt integration

steps.name: sp800-30-models
steps.summary: SP 800-30 Rev 1 data models (ThreatSource, ThreatEvent, LikelihoodAssessment, ImpactAssessment, RiskDetermination, RiskResponse, SP80030Report) with 13 unit tests

steps.name: ai-risk-pipeline
steps.summary: Two-stage AI risk pipeline (RiskAssessmentPipeline + StaticRiskAssessmentPipeline) with Haiku filter → Sonnet SP 800-30 assessment, static fallback, and 8 unit tests

steps.name: sar-report
steps.summary: SARGenerator with ControlAssessment/SecurityAssessmentReport dataclasses, per-control assessment logic (satisfied/other-than-satisfied/not-assessed), coverage calculation, and ATO/DATO recommendation from gate decision — 10 unit tests
